summary: Complete forensic analysis of agent activity in the Trinity Protocol workspace. Documents that 15+ Kaggle challenges coexist in one monolithic repo without isolation. Identifies that FORENSIC_*.md files from Feb 15-16 cover Spaceship Titanic (not Heart Disease), while the active configuration targets Heart Disease S6E2. Admits that the current agent mistakenly started executing Spaceship Titanic hardening tasks instead of focusing on the active Heart Disease challenge. Provides concrete recommendations for fixing the workspace organization.
